CREATE TABLE timestamps_test (id INTEGER, ts TIMESTAMP, ts_ns TIMESTAMP_NS, ts_ms TIMESTAMP_MS, ts_s TIMESTAMP_S, ts_tz TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (4, TIMESTAMP '-infinity', TIMESTAMP_NS '-infinity', TIMESTAMP_MS '-infinity', TIMESTAMP_S '-infinity', TIMESTAMPTZ '-infinity');
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (5, TIMESTAMP 'infinity', TIMESTAMP_NS 'infinity', TIMESTAMP_MS 'infinity', TIMESTAMP_S 'infinity', TIMESTAMPTZ 'infinity');
SELECT * FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts = TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456';
SELECT ts, ts_tz FROM timestamps_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, ts_ns FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts_ns > TIMESTAMP_NS '1990-01-01 00:00:00.000000000';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts < TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT ts, ts_ms FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts_ms DESC;
SELECT ts_s, COUNT(*) FROM timestamps_test GROUP BY ts_s HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT t1.id, t2.ts FROM timestamps_test t1 JOIN timestamps_test t2 ON t1.ts < t2.ts WHERE t1.id < t2.id;
